creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: zeising
Date: Wed May 15 18:51:13 2013
New Revision: 318255
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/318255

Log:
  Update to 2.6.3_01
  
  - many enhacements
  - localisation updates
  
  While here, trim makefile headers
  
  PR:		ports/178662
  Submitted by:	Rodrigo (ros) OSORIO <rodrigo@bebik.net> (maintainer)

  head/editors/omegaT/Makefile
  head/editors/omegaT/distinfo
  head/editors/omegaT/pkg-plist

==============================================================================
--- head/editors/omegaT/Makefile	Wed May 15 18:30:49 2013	(r318254)
+++ head/editors/omegaT/Makefile	Wed May 15 18:51:13 2013	(r318255)
@@ -1,15 +1,12 @@
